title: MojoLauncher FPS | Butterium Mobile
description: Optimization/FPS and quality of life. A client-like performance pack with custom menus/in-game HUD - now for mobile phones
body:
![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1388641212977909881?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%23ffffff&label=EliteCord&labelColor=FF399F&color=FF8132&link=https%3A%2F%2Felte.uk%2Fdiscord)

# What does this pack do?

Butterium Mobile is a modpack that makes your game **EVEN SMOOTHER** gameplay the lowest of hardware. Our optimizations *can* even **QUADRUPLE FPS** in some cases.

# What is the difference between Butterium Mobile and Butterium?

This is an **version of Butterium is optimized for MojoLauncher** with less junk. This makes it take up WAAAY less RAM and **run on low power devices with as low as 1.1GB of RAM** e.g **phones**, **chromebooks** and **tablets** (all via MojoLauncher)

We also make **changes to Minecraft's GUI that make it prettier, more integrated and mobile friendly**.

![FPS Diagram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16562e2336d753f518fb0ffb12bf890d02e7295a.png)

# Where do I report bugs?

If you encounter any incompatibilities or bugs whilst using this modpack please report them to the ELTE Studios Discord linked below.   ↓

https://discord.gg/paByquCyF8
